# dkablash.com

> Darya Kablash is a growth consultant based in Berlin, Germany. She helps B2B companies and SMEs (KMU) grow through SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), LinkedIn marketing, and Google Ads.

Darya Kablash works with B2B companies in the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland), offering hands-on growth consulting rather than agency-style retainers. Her services include:

- Consulting: strategic growth advice for B2B companies and SMEs
- SEO & GEO: search engine optimization and optimization for AI/LLM-based answer engines
- LinkedIn: organic LinkedIn strategy and content for B2B lead generation
- Google Ads: paid search campaign strategy and management

## Pages

- [Home](https://dkablash.com/): overview of services, experience, and results
- [Impressum](https://dkablash.com/impressum.html): legal notice
- [Datenschutz](https://dkablash.com/datenschutz.html): privacy policy
